case_title: CHRISTINE Y LANSING VS. THE ROMAN CATHOLIC WELFARE CORPORATION OF SAN FRAN

docket_entries.description: SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF LANSING, CHRISTINE Y AS TO DEFENDANT THE ROMAN CATHOLIC WELFARE CORPORATION OF SAN FRAN CISCO
